title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 71.808 - Benefit determinations by legislative body of city to be conclusive
text:
71.808.  Benefit determinations by legislative body of city to be conclusive. — The findings of the legislative body of the city of the benefits to be derived by said district as set out in the ordinance as required above shall be conclusive.
(L. 1972 H.B. 1156 § 10)
